reviews.review_title: one of the coolest fan games ever
reviews.review_description: Monke's home v2 if a very fun fangame i know there isn't a lot yet, and i hope there will be. i have some ideas. you should have a computer and a tutorial the computer should have rooms settings color and name. you should add a bunch of maps and maybe be the first game to have achievments. like if you tag someone you get an achievment, speaking of tag you should add more game modes like casual infection freeze tag capture the flag and ffa that would be fun. this is all i have to say for now and good luck with your game Declan.
